note: Stable SCN-* user-journey contracts. Tests MUST preserve these scenario IDs across revisions. Expectations describe the LIVE behavior to be verified during the implementation pass (authoring pass records the contract only). LABEL FINDING: smackerel images do NOT carry an identity/owner label today (Dockerfile + ml/Dockerfile stamp only OCI org.opencontainers.image.* labels; no io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner anywhere) — the 'else' branch. Scope 1 ADDS LABEL io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner=smackerel to both runtime stages; the smackerel-* dash-prefix name fallback is documented as explicitly-optional transitional coverage (not implemented). Both scopes exclude env=prod-labeled images (--filter label!=io.smackerel.environment=prod); the stage is dev-plane only (assert_dev_plane on SMACKEREL_ENV, dev-safe allow-list {development,test}). DRY_RUN convention: DRY_RUN=true prints '[DRY-RUN] Would execute: <cmd>' and executes nothing. Config is config/smackerel.yaml (SST, no template) via scripts/commands/config.sh required_value/config_key_missing (smackerel-no-defaults). CLI: ./smackerel.sh --env dev clean smart|test.

scenarios.title: Aged unused project images reclaimed on clean smart (dev plane)
scenarios.when: clean smart runs the new reclamation stage after the stack teardown
scenarios.then: docker image prune -a -f --filter until=48h --filter label=io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner=smackerel --filter label!=io.smackerel.environment=prod is executed and reclaimed space is logged
scenarios.testExpectation: build_unused_image_prune_argv 48 project == 'image prune -a -f --filter until=48h --filter label=io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner=smackerel --filter label!=io.smackerel.environment=prod'; DRY_RUN=true clean smart plan contains the exact command

scenarios.title: Images newer than the minimum age are preserved
scenarios.given: a smackerel unused image created 3 hours ago and unused_image_min_age_hours=48
scenarios.then: the until=48h filter excludes the image and it is preserved
scenarios.testExpectation: argv contains until=<configured>h; changing age changes only the until token

scenarios.title: Peer-product images are never removed under project scope
scenarios.given: a non-smackerel image lacking io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner=smackerel exists and unused_image_scope=project
scenarios.then: the label filter scopes the prune to owner-labeled smackerel images only; the peer image is not referenced or removed
scenarios.testExpectation: project argv contains --filter label=io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner=smackerel; peer image excluded by construction

scenarios.title: Stage gated off when remove_unused_images=false
scenarios.then: the reclamation stage is skipped and a 'disabled' line is logged; the prune command is absent from the plan
scenarios.testExpectation: clean smart (DRY_RUN) output omits the image-prune line and shows 'Aged unused-image reclamation disabled (cleanup.remove_unused_images=false)'

scenarios.title: DRY_RUN previews the plan and never touches volumes, containers, or state
scenarios.then: it prints '[DRY-RUN] Would execute: docker image prune -a -f --filter until=<N>h ...', executes no docker image prune, references no docker volume / --volumes token, references no docker container / docker rm token
scenarios.testExpectation: DRY_RUN=true prune_unused_images_aged 48 project prints the [DRY-RUN] Would execute line and a shadowed docker stub proves non-invocation; helper function bodies grep-clean of volume/container tokens

scenarios.title: A missing SST key fails loud
scenarios.when: config generation resolves the cleanup keys
scenarios.then: config_key_missing aborts non-zero with 'Missing config key: cleanup.unused_image_min_age_hours' and no docker prune runs
scenarios.testExpectation: a temp config/smackerel.yaml copy with the key stripped, generated under SMACKEREL_GENERATED_DIR isolation, exits non-zero with the missing-key message

scenarios.title: The other clean levels are unchanged
scenarios.given: clean full, clean status, and clean measure
scenarios.then: full still runs smackerel_run_down true, status still runs smackerel_compose ps -a, measure still runs docker system df; none call prune_unused_images_aged
scenarios.testExpectation: grep proof that the full)/status)/measure) arms are byte-for-byte unchanged and do not reference prune_unused_images_aged

scenarios.title: The env=prod guard refuses to run on a non-dev plane
scenarios.given: SMACKEREL_ENV=production (or any value not in {development, test})
scenarios.then: assert_dev_plane aborts non-zero with 'refusing dev-plane image reclamation on a non-dev plane (SMACKEREL_ENV=production)' and no docker image prune runs
scenarios.testExpectation: assert_dev_plane production / staging / '' (empty) aborts non-zero; assert_dev_plane development and test return 0; a config with runtime.environment: production under --env dev emits SMACKEREL_ENV=production which the guard catches

scenarios.title: env=prod-labeled images are excluded
scenarios.given: the reclamation stage builds its docker argv
scenarios.when: project or all scope is used
scenarios.then: the argv contains --filter label!=io.smackerel.environment=prod and an image labeled io.smackerel.environment=prod is excluded from removal
scenarios.testExpectation: both project and all argv contain --filter label!=io.smackerel.environment=prod

scenarios.title: The identity label is added to the build (label-add prerequisite)
scenarios.given: smackerel images carried no io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner label before this feature (read-only finding)
scenarios.when: the label-add prerequisite stamps io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner=smackerel in Dockerfile and ml/Dockerfile
scenarios.then: a newly built smackerel-core / smackerel-ml image carries io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner=smackerel; the untagged <none> version it later orphans retains that label; the project-scope filter reclaims it
scenarios.testExpectation: Dockerfile core stage AND ml/Dockerfile runtime stage each contain LABEL io.smackerel.lifecycle.owner="smackerel"; SMACKEREL_IMAGE_OWNER_LABEL constant matches the literal

scenarios.title: Never prune volumes or containers; never remove a running container's image
scenarios.given: the reclamation stage runs (real or dry-run)
scenarios.then: it references no docker volume / --volumes token, references no docker container prune / docker rm token, and docker image prune -a leaves any image backing a container in place; the persistent postgres/pgvector and NATS jetstream volumes are never referenced
scenarios.testExpectation: helper function bodies grep-clean of docker volume / --volumes / docker container / docker rm; docker image prune -a inherently refuses in-use image layers

scenarios.title: Repo-CLI clean test entrypoint runs the harness Docker-free (terminal-discipline)
scenarios.then: the clean) arm intercepts test before require_docker and execs the harness Docker-free; the whole harness runs green with full unfiltered output; clean test is listed in usage help
scenarios.testExpectation: the clean) dispatch execs the harness before require_docker; the harness exits 0 with all Scope 1-4 tests passing; 'clean test' appears in the clean help block
